## Launch the page before rebuilding the platform

PyColors templates are focused product surfaces for builders who need to ship a credible page quickly.

They are designed for AI and SaaS launches, product validation, agency work, polished marketing pages, and fast commercial experiments.

Templates are intentionally narrower than starters. A template helps you launch the public surface. A starter helps you build the product foundation behind it.

<Callout title="Core idea">
  Templates are the fastest path to a polished public page. Starters are the path to a full SaaS product foundation.
</Callout>

## Product ladder

<Tabs items={["Templates", "Starter Free", "Starter Pro"]}>
  <Tab value="Templates">
    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-border/60 bg-card p-6">
      <div className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">Launch the offer</div>
      <div className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-muted-foreground">Use templates when your bottleneck is presenting a product clearly, collecting interest, or launching a premium marketing surface.</div>
    </div>
  </Tab>
  <Tab value="Starter Free">
    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-border/60 bg-card p-6">
      <div className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">Validate the product surface</div>
      <div className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-muted-foreground">Use Starter Free when you need SaaS screens, dashboards, settings, billing entrypoints, and mocked app flows.</div>
    </div>
  </Tab>
  <Tab value="Starter Pro">
    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-border/60 bg-card p-6">
      <div className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">Wire the business layer</div>
      <div className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-muted-foreground">Use Starter Pro when you need real authentication, billing, protected routes, database foundations, and launch-ready SaaS wiring.</div>
    </div>
  </Tab>
</Tabs>

## How templates fit into PyColors

| Need | Product |
| --- | --- |
| Launch a marketing page | Template |
| Validate SaaS UX | Starter Free |
| Wire auth, billing, protected routes, and database foundations | Starter Pro |

<Callout type="info" title="Decision rule">
  Choose a template when the page is the bottleneck. Choose Starter Pro when the business layer is the bottleneck.
</Callout>
